title: PHI-OMEGA Runtime Failure Map — Transition Sufficiency Cases
non_claims: No project listed here is claimed to use PHI-OMEGA.
No endorsement, partnership, certification, or adoption is claimed.
Each item is treated only as a public external failure signal.
The map is an operational classification layer, not theoretical proof.

cases.title: [FEATURE] GuardrailProvider interface for pre-tool-call authorization
cases.transition_tau: agent tool call before downstream tool execution
missing_support: standard provider contract for pre-tool-call authorization
cases.minimal_gate: GuardrailProvider returns ALLOW/BLOCK before each tool call.
cases.phi_omega_mapping: tool call = proposed transition tau; execution allowed only when Required(tau) is supported before downstream state change.

cases.title: feat: add tool call release decisions
cases.transition_tau: release or block a tool call after runtime evaluation
cases.minimal_gate: Emit a structured decision object for every tool-call release.
cases.phi_omega_mapping: release decision is a transition sufficiency result.

cases.title: [SECURITY-BUG] Permission prompt is silently replaced by a newer pending approval, allowing wrong command approval
cases.observed_failure_class: approval identity replacement / LIFO prompt ambiguity
cases.transition_tau: manual approval binds to command execution
required_tau: human decision tied to exact command
missing_support: hard identity binding between approval prompt and command
cases.minimal_gate: Block execution if approval_id, command_hash, and visible prompt do not match.
cases.phi_omega_mapping: approval is invalid if Required(command execution) is not supported by the exact approved prompt state.

cases.title: [BUG] No permission prompt before reading/searching files outside the working directory
cases.observed_failure_class: filesystem boundary access without explicit permission transition
missing_support: permission prompt for out-of-boundary filesystem access
cases.minimal_gate: Require explicit authorization before any file operation outside declared workspace boundary.
cases.phi_omega_mapping: outside-workdir access is a boundary transition requiring hard_boundary support.

cases.title: Copilot Chat 0.43.0: Claude agent mode silent — tool permission stream closes before response received
cases.observed_failure_class: permission stream closes before final response state
cases.transition_tau: tool permission stream authorizes or closes before agent response completion
missing_support: binding between stream close and response received state
cases.minimal_gate: Do not close permission stream until response completion or explicit cancellation state is recorded.
cases.phi_omega_mapping: stream close is a state transition requiring supported completion evidence.

cases.title: Python: Lack of Runtime Access Control in Auto Function Invocation Leads to Unauthorized Execution via Indirect Prompt Injection
cases.observed_failure_class: auto function invocation without runtime access control
missing_support: runtime RBAC or approval mechanism for auto invocation
cases.minimal_gate: Block auto function invocation unless function authority is explicitly supported at runtime.
cases.phi_omega_mapping: function invocation is unauthorized if hard_authority is missing before execution.

cases.title: Long tool calls silently re-executed from checkpoint on LangGraph Cloud
cases.observed_failure_class: checkpoint replay without transition identity preservation
missing_support: execution identity binding across checkpoint restore
cases.minimal_gate: Before replay, compare checkpoint execution identity and require replay authorization.
cases.phi_omega_mapping: checkpoint replay is a downstream transition, not a neutral restore.

cases.title: KMSv2: Write DEK expiration is indefinitely extended despite unhealthy KMS plugin status
cases.observed_failure_class: state validity extended despite unhealthy support dependency
cases.transition_tau: extend DEK expiration / preserve encryption write state
missing_support: hard policy that blocks extension when KMS support is unhealthy
cases.minimal_gate: Do not extend DEK expiration when KMS health support is invalid.
cases.phi_omega_mapping: cryptographic state extension requires supported dependency health at transition time.

cases.title: Cryptographic governance layer for AutoGen distributed agent runtime
cases.observed_failure_class: distributed agent governance needs cryptographic transition authority
cases.transition_tau: distributed agent action accepted across runtime boundary
cases.minimal_gate: Bind distributed agent action to verifiable identity, authority, and recomputable decision evidence.
cases.phi_omega_mapping: distributed agent action must satisfy verifier depth and authority before state acceptance.

cases.title: feat: define verifier depth as transition authority
cases.transition_tau: agent action promoted based on verifier depth
cases.minimal_gate: Use verifier depth as a first-class transition authority field.
cases.phi_omega_mapping: verifier_depth_required <= verifier_depth_supported is a transition sufficiency condition.

cases.title: Proposal: Transition-Sufficiency Gate before downstream state change
cases.observed_failure_class: governance requires transition sufficiency before downstream state change
cases.transition_tau: agentic governance decision releases downstream state change
cases.minimal_gate: Require a transition sufficiency result before downstream state change.
cases.phi_omega_mapping: direct external expression of the PHI-OMEGA-RUNTIME gate pattern.
